discussion_comments.comment_body: I'm not a big fan of onmousemove, it is very chatty and can cause the UI to use a lot of resources. I would recommend adding a full-width div fixed to the top, which onmouseenter, causes the tabbar to show. Then, you can add a onmouseleave handler to the tabbar itself to hide it again. This should remove the need for an onmousemove handler.
this is also a good suggestion, just in case the mouseleave handler is still attached
